title: LEGO Minecraft Woodland Mansion Fighting Ring - Interactive Building Toy - incl. a Baby Zombie, Steve, Garret & Henry Minifigures - Movie Set for 10+ Year Old Boys, Girls & Gaming Fans - 21272
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: LEGO Minecraft movie set – Fans can bring battle scenes to life with the LEGO Minecraft Woodland Mansion Fighting Ring toy for 10+ year old boys, girls and teens
Minecraft toy – The building set features a functional fighting ring with scorekeepers in front of a mansion facade with a removable chest and weapons rack
LEGO Minecraft figures – Includes characters from the Minecraft film: Steve, Garrett, Henry, a baby zombie, a chicken jockey and a great hog
Interactive toy with accessories – Kids use weapons, potions and attachable handles to position characters as they recreate fun video game battles
Minecraft gift for kids – This fun building set makes a great gaming gift for 10+ year old boys, girls and teenagers who are fans of the film and the popular video game
3D instructions – Download the LEGO Builder app for an immersive experience with tools to zoom in, rotate models in 3D, save sets and track progress
Minecraft made real – LEGO Minecraft sets give players a different way to enjoy the game, with mobs, scenes and features brought to life with the hands-on creativity of LEGO bricks
description: From the manufacturer Bring A Minecraft Movie to life This collectible A Minecraft Movie gift features Steve, Garrett, Henry and a chicken jockey battling it out at the mansion. Interactive toy with Minecraft accessories Kids use handles to move characters and recreate battle scenes from A Minecraft Movie and explore adventures of their own. LEGO Minecraft Woodland Mansion Fighting Ring Minecraft movie characters LEGO Minecraft toy figures, including a posable great hog. Functional fighting ring Control the action using handles attached to the fighters. A mansion facade An impressive backdrop for the fighting-ring action. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Expand the LEGO Minecraft gaming Check out other LEGO Minecraft in the range (sold separately) for even more creative adventures for kids to explore.

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Creativity, Creativity, Spatial Recognition, Focus and Dexterity
